name: ExtensionOrganization_Description
title: R5: Additional details about the Organization that could be displayed as further information to identify the Organization beyond its name (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `Organization.description` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`Organization.description` 0..1 `markdown`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `Organization.description` 0..1 `markdown`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `Organization.description` has a context of Organization based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `Organization`.
Element `Organization.description` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: Additional details about the Organization that could be displayed as further information to identify the Organization beyond its name (new)

element.definition: Description of the organization, which helps provide additional general context on the organization to ensure that the correct organization is selected.
